team.description: This team is responsible for creating, providing, maintaining, and advancing the unified cloud architecture of common services used by all of the various products and services offered by Acuity.

team.displayName: Bangalore UC&C and Control  Dev Team

team.description: The Daedalus team is focused on the integration of Acuity's many cloud services and applications through a unified collection of common services.

The DC BGM Team serves as the strategic link between Product Management and Marketing. We translate product strategy into clear market positioning, customer‑ready messaging, and go‑to‑market execution. Our role ensures that what we build, how we communicate it, and how it reaches customers are fully aligned.
The QSC Brand & Communications team serves as the cornerstone of our organization's communications and brand identity.
